'''hakaja''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zzzs|zzzs]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-k-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zzzs|zzzs]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hakaja
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hækæjæth|hækæjæth]] || [[word:hækæjæj|hækæjæj]] || [[word:hækæjæsh|hækæjæsh]] || [[word:hækæjæ|hækæjæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hakakajath|hakakajath]] || [[word:hakakajaj|hakakajaj]] || [[word:hakakajash|hakakajash]] || [[word:hakakaja|hakakaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hakajath|hakajath]] || [[word:hakajaj|hakajaj]] || [[word:hakajash|hakajash]] || [[word:hakaja|hakaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hakafjath|hakafjath]] || [[word:hakafjaj|hakafjaj]] || [[word:hakafjash|hakafjash]] || [[word:hakafjaf|hakafjaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hakajatha|hakajatha]] || [[word:hakajaja|hakajaja]] || [[word:hakajasha|hakajasha]] || [[word:hakajaka|hakajaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hakajath|hakajath]] || [[word:hakajaj|hakajaj]] || [[word:hakajash|hakajash]] || [[word:hakaja|hakaja]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hakajathal|hakajathal]] || [[word:hakajajal|hakajajal]] || [[word:hakajashal|hakajashal]] || [[word:hakajakal|hakajakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hakajathatha|hakajathatha]] || [[word:hakajajaja|hakajajaja]] || [[word:hakajashasha|hakajashasha]] || [[word:hakajaka|hakajaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hakajathan|hakajathan]] || [[word:hakajajan|hakajajan]] || [[word:hakajashan|hakajashan]] || [[word:hakajakan|hakajakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hakajathaoro|hakajathaoro]] || [[word:hakajajaoro|hakajajaoro]] || [[word:hakajashaoro|hakajashaoro]] || [[word:hakajakaoro|hakajakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
